name: @ui2v/workspace
description: ui2v workspace for rendering animation JSON into MP4 video with Canvas and WebCodecs

scripts.publish:packages: bun run test && npm publish --workspaces --access public
scripts.test: bun run build && bun run test:unit && bun run test:metadata && bun run test:surface && bun run test:pack && bun run test:examples && bun run test:docs && bun run test:validate && bun run test:cli-errors && bun run test:inspect-runtime && bun run test:preview-studio && bun run test:smoke && bun run test:render-scale && bun run test:runtime-render && bun run test:render-failures && bun run test:init
scripts.test:ci: bun run build && bun run test:unit && bun run test:metadata && bun run test:surface && bun run test:pack && bun run test:examples && bun run test:docs && bun run test:validate && bun run test:cli-errors && bun run test:inspect-runtime && bun run test:preview-studio && bun run test:render-failures
scripts.test:unit: bun run packages/core/test/parser.test.mjs && bun run packages/runtime-core/test/runtime-core.test.mjs && bun run packages/engine/test/canvas-draw-command-executor.test.mjs && bun run packages/engine/test/custom-code-runtime.test.mjs

author: ui2v
